title: Z80 Family Platform Stack
body:
# Z80 Family Platform Stack

**Platform stack:** `retro_z80` · **Era:** 1976–1995 · **Vendor:** Zilog · **Count:** 7

Z80 / Z180 systems — SMS, MSX, Spectrum, Game Boy, Game Gear.

## Stack doctrine

This page lists every combinatorics leaf stamped `platform_stack: retro_z80` plus companion dies emitted from `field-cpu-companion-seed.json`. Host and guest CPUs matching the stack's `match` rules receive `always_with` linkage at combinatorics build — no manual wiring.

## Manufacturing notes — companion dies

- **Zilog Z80 CTC** (Zilog, 8-bit) — Counter/timer chip — Z80 DMA path
- **Zilog Z80 DART** (Zilog, 8-bit) — Dual UART — Z80 serial

## Catalog ids

The `chip_ids` array holds all **7** entries for this platform stack, sorted alphabetically. Run `field-ironclad-chips-combinatorics.py combinatronic` for path percents and imprint renders.

*Stack: retro_z80 · seed: data/field-cpu-companion-seed.json · citation: ironclad:chips:3*
